title: Arc Progression Contract
description: Defines arc completion rules: encounter thresholds, story beat markers, plot flag checks, and completion conditions with AND/OR logic

encounter_threshold.description: Minimum encounters required before arc can complete

required_story_beats.description: Story beats that must be completed for arc progression (e.g., boss_defeated, artifact_acquired)

required_plot_flags.description: Plot flags that must be set true for arc completion (e.g., goblins_defeated, gundren_rescued)

value.description: Value to check — integer for threshold, string for beat/flag, nested conditions object for nested

operator.description: Operator for nested conditions (only when type=nested)

rules.description: Sub-rules for nested conditions (only when type=nested)
Array of rules combined by the operator

completion_conditions.description: Completion logic combining encounter_threshold, story_beats, and plot_flags with AND/OR operators

arc_time_limit.description: Optional: in-game days before arc auto-completes
